settings.content:
Welcome to Femorra (femorra.in). By accessing or purchasing from this website, you agree to the following terms:

1. About our store

Femorra is an online retail store operating on a curated direct-fulfilment (dropshipping) model — products listed on this website are sourced from and shipped directly by third-party supplier and warehouse partners. Femorra is a reseller and is not the manufacturer of the products listed, and product branding or packaging may vary from images shown.

2. Products and pricing

  • All prices are listed in Indian Rupees (₹ INR), inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
  • We make every effort to display products accurately; slight variations in colour or finish can occur due to screens and lighting.
  • We reserve the right to modify prices, discontinue products, or refuse or cancel any order (with a full refund), including in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock unavailability at our supplier.

3. Payments

Femorra is a prepaid-only store. Payments are collected securely through our payment gateway. Cash on Delivery is not offered. Your order is confirmed only after successful payment.

4. Shipping and delivery

Delivery across India within 4–5 business days, as detailed in our Shipping Policy, which forms part of these terms.

5. Returns and refunds

Governed by our Refund & Return Policy — including the mandatory unboxing video requirement for damage or wrong-item claims reported within 48 hours of delivery.

6. User conduct

You agree to provide accurate order and contact information and not to misuse this website, including fraudulent orders, false claims, or attempts to breach site security.

7. Intellectual property

All content on femorra.in — text, graphics, logos and layout — belongs to Femorra or its content partners and may not be copied without permission.

8. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Femorra's liability for any claim arising from an order is limited to the amount paid for that order. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses, or for courier delays beyond our control.

9. Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Maharashtra, India.

10. Contact

Femorra · femorra.in
Email: theamazemedia2025@gmail.com · Phone/WhatsApp: +91 81044 08935
